_meta.note: NEXUS, ATLAS, HORIZON, SPARK tracked in Linear — separate export
_meta.simulation_note: Simulated state as of 2026-04-13. Baseline: 2026-03-11. Tensions applied: T1 Auth0 punt, T2 Model Serving descope, T3 SHIELD mandate, T4 MERIDIAN mobile endpoints scoped in, T5 PULSE FlowEngine unresolved.

sprints.name: Sprint 2026-09 (Mar 9 – Mar 20)
sprints.velocityNote: SHIELD sprint came in 8% below plan — Model Serving controls still unstarted. MERIDIAN mobile scoping added unplanned work mid-sprint.

sprints.name: Sprint 2026-10 (Mar 23 – Apr 3)
sprints.velocityNote: SHIELD velocity picked up after Yuki mandate Mar 25. PULSE DataCore unblocked Mar 21 (schema drift resolved). MERIDIAN M1 closed Apr 3.

sprints.name: Sprint 2026-11 (Apr 7 – Apr 17)
sprints.velocityNote: Mid-sprint as of Apr 13. SHIELD Wave 2 and 3 teams now actively working controls. PULSE FlowEngine still at low velocity — Amara decision pending Apr 15.

epics.summary: SOC 2 Control Implementation — Wave 1 (Security & Compliance Eng)
epics.changeNote: Sec Eng team continuing at pace. 10 additional controls completed since Mar 11.
Yuki mandate Mar 25 unblocked Core Infra team. Picked up 4 new controls week of Mar 30. Accelerating.

epics.summary: SOC 2 Control Implementation — Wave 3 (Model Serving / NovaAI)

blockers.summary: 14 controls blocked on NEXUS IAM — Auth0 decision punted by CISO Mar 18
blockers.status: Unresolved — blocked on Auth0 contract decision (CISO)
blockers.note: Auth0 renewal decision punted by James Whitfield Mar 18. NEXUS IAM now targeting Aug 28. 14 controls cannot proceed until IAM available.

epics.changeNote: Leo Nakamura formally assigned as owner after Yuki mandate. Model Serving team began 2 non-IAM controls week of Apr 7. IAM-dependent controls (14) remain blocked.

epics.summary: Vanta evidence collection and audit preparation
epics.changeNote: Fatima began Vanta evidence tagging for completed controls. Early start to avoid Aug crunch.

epics.summary: DataCore pipeline migration — Airflow to Temporal (180 pipelines)
epics.changeNote: Schema drift blocker (PULSE-189) resolved Mar 21. Significant velocity recovery. 24% advance in 3 weeks.

epics.summary: FlowEngine pipeline migration — Airflow to Temporal (340 pipelines)

blockers.summary: FlowEngine streaming SDK launch consuming 50% of Stream Processing team — migration at minimal velocity
blockers.note: SDK launch is Amara's competing VP Product priority. Decision expected Apr 15. If SDK wins, M4 slips 6 weeks to Aug 12.

epics.changeNote: Minimal progress. Stream Processing team 50% on SDK launch. Only Pipeline Orchestration driving migration.

epics.summary: NovaAI training pipeline migration — Airflow to Temporal (95 pipelines)

blockers.summary: Runbook creation in progress for 40% of NovaAI pipelines — migration blocked until complete
blockers.status: In Progress — 55% of missing runbooks now drafted
blockers.note: Leo's team prioritized runbook creation. On pace to clear blocker by Apr 25.

epics.changeNote: Runbook creation accelerating. Migration of documented pipelines proceeding in parallel.

epics.summary: v2 API feature parity — all endpoints including mobile push notifications
epics.changeNote: Completed Apr 3 including mobile endpoints (3 push notification endpoints from MERIDIAN-4 merged into this epic on Mar 13). 2-week slip from original Mar 20 date — scoped-in mobile endpoints were the driver.
Slightly delayed from Apr 1 target. Completing documentation and enterprise-specific migration guides. On track for Apr 18.
5 enterprise customers migrated since Mar 11. Migration tooling improvements accelerating pace.

epics.summary: Mobile push notification endpoints — HORIZON dependency (merged into MERIDIAN-1)
epics.note: Scoped in Mar 13 joint session. Assigned to Lara Costa. Merged into MERIDIAN-1 epic scope. Completed Apr 3 as part of M1 close.

SHIELD.changeNote: 30 issues moved to done since Mar 11. Mandate-driven acceleration in Wave 2 and 3 teams. 14 IAM-dependent controls still blocked.

PULSE.changeNote: 49 issues moved to done. DataCore schema drift resolution unlocked significant progress. FlowEngine migration still at low velocity.

MERIDIAN.changeNote: M1 and MERIDIAN-4 closed. 80 issues moved to done. No critical blockers remaining. SDK v2 and tooling in final stretch.

teams.name: Security & Compliance Eng
teams.notes: At capacity. ATLAS SSO (M3) nearing completion — will free up bandwidth for SHIELD Wave 3 after Apr 30.

teams.name: Pipeline Orchestration
teams.notes: Carrying DataCore migration velocity since schema drift resolved. Primary driver of PULSE-1 progress.

teams.name: Stream Processing
teams.notes: SDK launch consuming 50% bandwidth. Amara Osei decision expected Apr 15 — if SDK wins, PULSE-M4 slips 6 weeks.

teams.name: Developer Experience
teams.notes: MERIDIAN M1 complete. Now heads-down on Python SDK GA (M2, Apr 30) and migration tooling completion.

teams.name: Governance & Catalog
teams.notes: Steady. SHIELD mandate added 2 controls from this team week of Mar 30.

teams.name: Model Serving
teams.notes: Karl forced Leo decision Mar 27. SPARK formally descoped from 90% to 55% Model Serving commitment. ATLAS prioritized. SPARK M2 slips 6 weeks as consequence. Still overcommitted at 145% — flagged for Karl SteerCo Apr 17.
